posts.raw_content:
As much as our goal is to Make America Great Again, we must also make ourselves great again! By no means does this mean perfection, but willing to make progress in all aspects of life. 

Whether its getting closer to Jesus, quitting drinking/drugs, losing weight, learning to not be angry, etc, they are all things that can help us to be the best version of ourselves. 

This is one thing that separates us from the leftists - they have no desire to become better, or to build, or create anew. They are not capable of that, which is why they go crazy when they see someone getting happier and healthier. This is also why they want to destroy us. 

At the end of the day, it is a spiritual battle as the Bible tells us!
